overview: Narsimha Reddy Engineering College (NRCM), located in Maisammaguda, Kompally, Secunderabad, Hyderabad, Telangana, is a prominent private engineering institution established in 2007. Managed by the Jakkula Educational Society, the college is a UGC Autonomous institution affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Hyderabad (JNTUH). Spread across an aesthetically designed campus with a total built-up area of over 200,000 sq. ft., NRCM aims to bridge the gap between academic theory and industry demand by delivering quality technical education, modern infrastructure, and research-driven initiatives.
accreditation: UGC Autonomous status; Approved by AICTE, New Delhi; Affiliated with JNTUH; Ranked #179 in India by India Today 2025; Actively preparing and data-submitted for NIRF participation.

coursesAndFees.program: B.Tech Flagship Programs (CSE, AI & ML, Cyber Security, IT)
coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: ₹70,000 to ₹87,800 per year (Total 4-year tuition fee approximately ₹2,76,000 to ₹3,16,000).

coursesAndFees.program: B.Tech Core Programs (ECE, EEE, Mechanical, Civil)
coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: ₹70,000 to ₹87,800 per year (Total 4-year tuition fee approximately ₹2,76,000).
₹40,000 per year (Total course tuition fee approximately ₹80,000 to ₹84,000).
Fees aligned with standard university guidelines for lateral entry batches.

placements.highestSalary: ₹14.00 LPA – ₹25.00 LPA (Varies across active placement batches)
placements.totalOffers: 1,000+ job offers generated during active placement drives
placements.companiesVisited: TCS, Google, Infosys, Accenture, Amazon, Tech Mahindra, Capgemini, Cognizant
placements.internshipHighlights: Seamlessly integrates industry-sponsored projects, technical hackathons, and corporate internships into the active academic curriculum.

admissions.admissionProcess: B.Tech admissions are majorly based on state-level TG EAPCET entrance rank or JEE Main via Convener Quota (A Category) and Management Quota (B Category). MBA admission requires a valid degree alongside a valid TG ICET score.
admissions.importantDates: Admissions systematically align with the schedules announced by the Telangana State Council of Higher Education (TSCHE).

campus.area: Spacious green campus with 200,000+ sq. ft. built-up area.
facilities: College Bus Transportation Network across Twin Cities
campus.specialNote: The campus features comprehensive, separate hostel provisions exclusively for female students accommodating over 150 residents, ensuring secure and nutrition-focused meal systems.

hostelFees.GirlsHostelOnCampus: ₹80,000 per year (inclusive of mess and accommodation)
hostelFees.PrivateHostelsNearby: ₹5,000 per month (approx. ₹60,000 per year) + ₹5,000 advance registration

contact.address: Narsimha Reddy Engineering College (NRCM), Maisammaguda (V), Kompally, Secunderabad – 500100, Telangana State, India

scholarships.meritScholarships: Facilitates full and partial tuition fee waivers through rigorous state counseling ranks.
scholarships.fullWaiver: 100% tuition fee reimbursement for qualified candidates clearing state cut-offs under reserved quotas.
scholarships.partialWaiver: Merit benefits and internal concessions evaluated on performance benchmarks.
scholarships.governmentAid: Eligible SC, ST, OBC, EWS, and minority category students can directly avail the Telangana state TS ePASS fee reimbursement schemes.
